subject: Re:
body:
I find this impossible to believe but the District
Attorney ,, said yesterday,, that he had the wrong
facts,,, and that even the allegatrions were much
differnt than he thought..l.  he was embarassed,,,and
said that the worst they would do would charge
solicitation but un two weeks,, decide whether to drop
it altogether

--- Peter Mandelson <petermandelson@btinternet.com>
wrote:

> Worried that I haven't heard from you. Are you

> P
